label: Expired Leases
description: Flags leases that ended without a new lease replacing them.
hint: No configurable parameters — toggle on/off only.
script:
name: "Expired Leases"
description: >
  Creates a leasing task for every lease that ended before today
  and whose unit has no newer active lease to replace it.

trigger:
  type: schedule
  interval_hours: "{{params.interval_hours}}"

scope:
  resource: lease
  filters:
    - field: end_date
      operator: lt
      value: "{{today}}"

conditions:
  - field: unit.active_lease_count
    operator: equals
    value: 0

actions:
  - type: create_task
    subject: "Expired lease: {{lease.tenant.first_name}} {{lease.tenant.last_name}} \u2013 {{lease.unit.label}}"
    category: leasing
    urgency: high
    body: >
      The lease for {{lease.tenant.first_name}} {{lease.tenant.last_name}} at
      {{lease.unit.label}}, {{lease.property.address_line1}} expired on
      {{lease.end_date}} and has not been renewed.
      Confirm move-out status or start a renewal conversation.
